changeSet.author: san
changeSet.sql: alter table schedule.arrangements drop constraint ck_status; alter table schedule.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('NEW', 'SCHEDULED', 'RUNNING', 'STOPPING', 'STOPPED', 'FINISHED'));

rollback.sql: alter table schedule.arrangements drop constraint ck_status; alter table schedule.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('NEW', 'RUNNING', 'SCHEDULED', 'STOPPED', 'FINISHED'));
